offer: For construction foremen processing 5-10 projects daily, inefficient reporting causes project delays. We automate daily field service completion reports instead of manual reporting via spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient reporting of daily field service completions
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction foremen
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about reporting tools
DM outreach to 20-50 foremen with demo video
Join community forums for construction project management
try_it: Let users try simple report generation and user-friendly interface on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
